content:
# Session 39 (iter-039) — review

## Metadata
- **No prover lane** (`attempts_raw.jsonl` line 1 `no_prover_lane: true`; `meta.json` empty;
  `prover.jsonl` empty). 3rd consecutive terminal-closeout iter (037, 038, 039).
- Sorry count: unchanged. Core leg files all 0-sorry. Only `QuotScheme.lean` (4 χ skeletons
  L126/165/201/228) + `RelativeSpec.lean` (7) carry sorries — both out-of-cone.
- `git diff HEAD~1 --stat` = empty (single extraction commit `c53d9c9`; no Lean edit since iter-036).
- `sync_leanok` iter=39, sha=90ad0b1: +0/−0, `chapters_touched: []`. No chapter churn ⇒ over-strip glitch
  not triggered (consistent with no `.lean`/`.tex` prover edits).

## Targets attempted
None. No closable in-cone sorry exists. The only sorries are the deliberately-carved out-of-leg nodes
(χ → cohomology/Snapper; RelativeSpec → inherited parent code). The plan correctly declined all three
non-options: (a) re-probe χ (genuinely cohomology-gated, body read iter-038), (b) open the cohomology
megaleg (overreach — critic-validated H⁰ scope, not USER-opened), (c) split the done 4k-line file
(busywork risking axiom-clean work). Mechanical no-dispatch is the right call.

## Leg state — DELIVERED axiom-clean, await merge
Closable scope all in (verified axiom-clean `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` in prior reviews,
file unchanged since): `Grassmannian.represents` + `tautologicalQuotient_epi` + B1–B7 assoc + ∀L
`GSemiring` + invertible-L `GCommSemiring` + module `sectionGradedModule_gmodule`. No live frontier.

## Verification (mine)
- No new decls to `lean_verify`; file unchanged since iter-036 (no regression possible — no edit).
- `QuotScheme.lean` sorries confirmed present (4 typed χ skeletons); no in-cone consumer.

## Blueprint doctor — out-of-cone, do NOT edit
`logs/iter-039/blueprint-doctor.md`: all findings on dormant inherited chapters —
`Cohomology_FlatBaseChange` (2 phantom `% archon:covers` for non-existent `FlatBaseChange.lean` /
`FlatBaseChangeGlobal.lean` + 14 broken `\ref`), `Picard_GlueDescent` (4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`),
`Picard_QuotScheme` (13 broken `\cref`). Merge-back extraction artifacts; no prover dispatched near them ⇒
phantom covers misroute nothing. Parent reconciles at merge per ARCHON_MEMORY. Not edited.

## Coverage debt
356 `lean_aux` unmatched = inherited parent-construction decls (Grassmannian chart helpers + RelativeSpec
lineage), physically present from the single-commit extraction but blueprinted in the parent. Merge-time;
not this short-lived leg's debt.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. No chapter edit; sync +0/−0; no rename/wrong marker to correct.

## TO_USER.md
- Janitor pass: replaced the stale "capped stretch in progress" bullet (claimed the module `Gmodule`
  instance still had "one blocker remains" — FALSE, closed iter-036) with a single terminal-closeout
  bullet. File now states the leg is fully delivered and awaiting merge.

## Recommendations
See `recommendations.md`. Headline: no in-loop work remains; hold for merge unless USER_HINTS opens the
cohomology scope.
